SEARCH
Module runtimeSE

Package runtimeSE

package runtimeSE
The runtimeSE package declares public interfaces of the runtime module.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    runtimeSE.impl
    The runtimeSE.impl package provides the access point to the non-public implementation classes of the runtime package.
  • Class
    Description
    CommandRunner
    Interface CommandRunner defines the API of a utility that can split command line arguments by key-words ("commands") into several invocations of the run(String command, KVArgs args) method on a single instance of a class that implements the CommandRunner interface.
    CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
    Record CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance represents one invocation of the run(String command, KVArgs args) method on a single instance of a class that implements the CommandRunner interface.
    CommandRunner.KVArgs
    Interface CommandRunner.KVArgs provides access to typed key-value arguments converted from bare String[] args command line arguments.
    Logger
    Interface Logger defines the API of a simple logging utility that emulates log4j logging.
    Runner
    Interface Runner defines the contract for "runnable" classes that are detected during class scanning and selected by the application.run.policy property.
    Runner.Accessors
    Annotation Runner.Accessors is used to define the order by priority) of a class that implements the Runner interface for bean instantiation and execution by the runtimeSE system.
    RuntimeSE
    Interface RuntimeSE defines the public API of the runtimeSE module.
